panels.title: Highest-risk drugs, ingredients, manufacturers, and facilities

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ce.display_name,
  ce.entity_type,
  rc.risk_type,
  rc.severity,
  rc.status,
  rc.risk_score,
  rc.confidence,
  rc.updated_at
FROM risk_cases rc
JOIN canonical_entities ce ON ce.id = rc.scope_entity_id
WHERE rc.scope_type IN ('Drug', 'ActiveIngredient', 'Manufacturer', 'Facility')
ORDER BY rc.risk_score DESC, rc.confidence DESC
LIMIT 50;

SELECT case_key, title, severity, status, risk_score, confidence, updated_at
FROM risk_cases
WHERE risk_type IN ('recall_quality', 'regulatory')
ORDER BY risk_score DESC, updated_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

SELECT case_key, title, severity, status, risk_score, confidence, updated_at
FROM risk_cases
WHERE risk_type = 'shortage'
ORDER BY risk_score DESC, updated_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

panels.title: Manufacturer and facility entities needing review

targets.rawSql:
SELECT entity_type, canonical_key, display_name, confidence, review_reason, updated_at
FROM canonical_entities
WHERE entity_type IN ('Manufacturer', 'Facility')
  AND needs_review = true
ORDER BY confidence ASC, updated_at DESC
LIMIT 50;
